text: Once inside the operating room, the user has the freedom to look in any direction and study the location of the personnel, equipment and components of the robotic system.
Interaction with different elements is possible by clicking on them.
Information can also be obtained in the form of instructional videos on key procedural steps, as in this case, where it demonstrates how to perform the docking of the robotic arms.
The third scene focuses on critical steps of the procedure.
In this video, the initial stage of the procedure is demonstrated involving the dissection of the inferior pulmonary ligament using a bipolar energy dissection.
The second video focuses on the technique that should be used for the proper and safe dissection of lymph nodes.
A special recommendation is to resist the temptation to grasp the lymph node until it has been dissected almost completely, which prevent bleeding.

In another one of the videos, we can observe the technique used for the dissection of vascular elements, highlighting the importance of dissecting from both sides before attempting to create space behind the vein or the artery.
back in the operating room, you can once again review any of the information points.
